name: claimpilot-backend
description: ClaimPilot Backend Express 5 TypeScript API Server

scripts.db:init: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const { Pool } = require('pg'); const fs = require('fs'); const pool = new Pool({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL }); pool.query(fs.readFileSync('src/db/schema.sql', 'utf8')).then(() => { console.log('DB Schema Initialized'); process.exit(0); }).catch(err => { console.error(err); process.exit(1); })"
